title: thelypteris novae-caledoniae
intro: Thelypteris novae-caledoniae, also known as New Caledonian Maiden's Hair, is a species of fern native to New Caledonia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris novae-caledoniae include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
